spec_match.rationale: Helper utility now maps the current Chrome 150 migration fields: destination id, migrate_from, allow_migration, optional migrate_to, behavior, and install_url.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive: updates destination manifest, old-origin association, and optional old-manifest JSON live as the user types, with validation and clipboard copying.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Corresponds to the updated parent index card describing migrate_from, allow_migration, and optional migrate_to output.

edge_cases.rationale: Performs validations for HTTPS origins, distinct origins, destination and old app IDs, behavior values, optional install_url, and required app name.

references.rationale: See-also now includes the mandatory ChromeStatus link and current Chrome Developers migration reference.

design_system.rationale: Uses sleek forms, a tab switcher, clean code highlights, and visual success/error validation badges.

summary: Re-reviewed after replacing the obsolete migration generator with the current migrate_from / allow_migration flow and adding the required ChromeStatus reference.
